name: The Final Vow
descriptionTemplate: Gain +[Arg1]% Temporary Crit. Rate and [Arg2] Temporary {STR}. If you're in a Boss Battle and have played no cards this turn, attempt to trigger {Death Resistance} [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|time|times}. If successful, gain [Block:Arg4] Shield. This effect can only trigger [Arg5] {plural:[Arg5]|time|times} per battle.
lore: The knight had sworn to guard those dear to him with this lance. Now it pierces his chest, yet only to keep danger at bay—his final vow fulfilled.
